title: osmia divergens
intro: Osmia divergens, also known as the Divergent Bee Orchid, is a species of orchid native to Europe and North Africa. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Osmia divergens include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being dried for use in herbal blends and potpourri.
